title: prunus domestica var. vinaria
intro: Prunus domestica var. vinaria, also known as Black Corinth or Zante Currant, is a variety of the edible black currant fruit-bearing shrub that is native to the Mediterranean region. The medicinal properties of Prunus domestica var. vinaria include its high antioxidant and anti-inflammatory content, which can help protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation in the body. The health benefits of consuming Prunus domestica var. vinaria include its potential to help lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. Prunus domestica var. vinaria can be prepared as a jam, jelly, or syrup, and is also used in herbal medicine as a tincture or infusion, although its use should be limited due to its potential toxicity in large quantities.
